pkgmetadata.longdescription:
CLIProxyAPI wraps CLI-based AI models (Gemini CLI, Claude Code, ChatGPT Codex, Qwen Code, iFlow, Antigravity) and exposes them as standard OpenAI/Gemini/Claude/Codex compatible HTTP API endpoints. This enables integration with any client that speaks these standard API formats.
This is the pre-built binary package.
